parsed_output.justification: Paul is the only player who does not claim a Village-aligned role, explicitly stating 'I was the minion.' While he attempts to deflect suspicion toward Mitchell by claiming Mitchell is now a Werewolf due to a swap, the other four players (Justin, Mitchell, Tyler, and James) have provided a consistent narrative regarding their roles (Seer, Robber, Troublemaker, and Copycat). Since Paul is the only outlier and has openly aligned himself with Team Werewolf, he is the most likely candidate to be the Werewolf or Minion.
